WITH INC AS 
(
	SELECT DISTINCT M1.IncentivePlanID,M3.IncentiveMetricID,M2.DistributionType,M1.EffectiveFrom,M1.EffectiveTo 
	FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
	JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2
	ON M1.IncentivePlanID = M2.IncentivePlanID
	JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3
	ON M2.IncentiveMetricID = M3.IncentiveMetricID
	),

CAL AS 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN INC 
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.EffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.EffectiveTo
	),

BASELINE AS 
(
SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
B.Division,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.DistributionType,
--A.CalendarDate AS PeriodDate,

CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate

FROM CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON A.IncentivePlanID = B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division = B.Division
)


SELECT 
EmployeePK,
Division,
IncentiveMetricID,
IncentivePlanID,
DistributionType,
PeriodDate,
NULL AS TargetValue,
NULL AS ActualValue,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM BASELINE

--****************

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_FACT_JOB') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_FACT_JOB;
	
SELECT * INTO #T_FACT_JOB FROM EDW.FACT_JOB;


--****************

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Multiple_Jobs') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Multiple_Jobs;
	
	
SELECT LeadID,COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(ContractDate AS DATE)) AS JobCount 
INTO #T_Multiple_Jobs 
FROM #T_FACT_JOB 
GROUP BY LeadID;


--*****************

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_FACT_JOB_1') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_FACT_JOB_1;

SELECT A.*,B.JobCount 
INTO #T_FACT_JOB_1 
FROM #T_FACT_JOB A
LEFT JOIN #T_Multiple_Jobs B 
ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID;


--*******************


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_ACTUAL_BASELINE') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_ACTUAL_BASELINE;


SELECT 
	M2.Division,
	M2.BranchID,
	M2.ACU_ID,
	M2.LeadID,
	M2.ProductID,
	SS.TX_Channel,
	SS.TX_SourceGroup,
	SS.TX_SourceCode,
	M2.ApptDate,
	M2.DateEntered,
	M2.EntryDate,
	M2.BTD,
	M2.CANCELLED,
	M2.DEMO,
	M2.NET_ISSUED,
	M2.SOLD,
	(M2.BTD + M2.CANCELLED)					AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
	(M2.SOLD - (M2.BTD + M2.CANCELLED) ) 	AS NETSALES,
	
	M2.BTD_AMT,
	M2.CANCELLED_AMT,
	M2.SOLD_AMT 										AS GROSS_SALES,
	(M2.BTD_AMT + M2.CANCELLED_AMT) 					AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
	(M2.SOLD_AMT - (M2.BTD_AMT + M2.CANCELLED_AMT) ) 	AS NETSALES_AMT,
	M2.SET_COUNT
	INTO #T_ACTUAL_BASELINE
	FROM
	(
			SELECT 
			Division,
			BranchID,
			ACU_ID,
			ProductID,
			ApptDate,
			DateEntered,
			EntryDate,
			GrossSales,
			LeadID,
			LeadSubSourceID,
			CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='BANK TURN DOWN' AND GrossSales >0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD,
			CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='BANK TURN DOWN' AND GrossSales >0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS BTD_AMT,
			CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' AND GrossSales >0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CANCELLED,
			CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' AND GrossSales >0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS CANCELLED_AMT,
			CASE WHEN LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NOT NULL AND EverSat>0 		THEN LeadID ELSE NULL END AS DEMO,
			CASE WHEN LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NOT NULL AND EverNetIssued>0 	THEN LeadID ELSE NULL END AS NET_ISSUED,
			CASE WHEN GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SOLD,
			CASE WHEN GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS SOLD_AMT,
			EverSet AS SET_COUNT
			FROM 
			(
					SELECT
					B.Division,
					B.BranchID,
					BR.ACU_ID,
					B.ProductID,
					CASE 
						WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
							(CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END) END AS GrossSales,
					
					CASE 
						WHEN A.JobCount > 1 THEN CAST(B.ApptDate AS DATE)
						ELSE COALESCE(CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE),CAST(B.ApptDate AS DATE)) 
						END AS ApptDate,
					
					B.DateEntered,
					B.EntryDate,
						
					UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY) AS UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY,
					CASE WHEN B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NULL OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='' OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='0' THEN NULL ELSE B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
					B.EverSat,
					B.EverNetIssued,
					B.LeadID,
					B.LeadSubSourceID,
					CASE WHEN B.EverSet =1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EverSet
					
					FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
					LEFT JOIN #T_FACT_JOB_1  A
					ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
					ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID
					
					LEFT JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN BR 
					ON B.BranchID = BR.BranchID
					
					--WHERE CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE)  >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-2,'-01-01') AS DATE)
					--AND CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE) <= GETDATE()
					
					) M1
				
				) M2
		
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING SS
		ON M2.LeadSubSourceID = SS.LeadSubSourceID;





--*******************************************


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_ACTUAL') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_ACTUAL;
	

-- ##### BY APPOINTMENT_DATE Load #####

SELECT 
'APPOINTMENT_DATE' AS IDENTIFIER,
A.Division,
A.ApptDate AS CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ACU_ID AS Market,
--B.UNI_Market AS Market,
A.ProductID,
A.TX_Channel,
A.TX_SourceGroup,
A.TX_SourceCode,
SUM(BTD)						AS BTD,
SUM(CANCELLED)					AS CANCELLED,
COUNT(DISTINCT DEMO)			AS DEMO,
COUNT(DISTINCT NET_ISSUED)		AS NET_ISSUED,
SUM(SOLD)						AS SOLD,
SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL)				AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
SUM(NETSALES)					AS NETSALES,
SUM(BTD_AMT)					AS BTD_AMT,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT)				AS CANCELLED_AMT,
SUM(GROSS_SALES)				AS GROSS_SALES,
SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT)			AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
SUM(NETSALES_AMT)				AS NETSALES_AMT,
SUM(SET_COUNT)					AS SET_COUNT,
COUNT(DISTINCT LeadID)  		AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT

INTO #T_ACTUAL

FROM #T_ACTUAL_BASELINE A 
--LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
--ON A.BranchID = B.BranchID
WHERE  CAST(A.ApptDate AS DATE)  >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-2,'-01-01') AS DATE)
AND CAST(A.ApptDate AS DATE) <= GETDATE()

GROUP BY 
A.Division,
A.ApptDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ACU_ID ,
A.ProductID,
A.TX_Channel,
A.TX_SourceGroup,
A.TX_SourceCode;




-- ##### BY ENTRY_DATE Load #####

INSERT INTO #T_ACTUAL


SELECT 
'ENTRY_DATE' AS IDENTIFIER,
A.Division,
A.EntryDate AS CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ACU_ID AS Market,
--B.UNI_Market AS Market,
A.ProductID,
A.TX_Channel,
A.TX_SourceGroup,
A.TX_SourceCode,
SUM(BTD)						AS BTD,
SUM(CANCELLED)					AS CANCELLED,
COUNT(DISTINCT DEMO)			AS DEMO,
COUNT(DISTINCT NET_ISSUED)		AS NET_ISSUED,
SUM(SOLD)						AS SOLD,
SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL)				AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
SUM(NETSALES)					AS NETSALES,
SUM(BTD_AMT)					AS BTD_AMT,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT)				AS CANCELLED_AMT,
SUM(GROSS_SALES)				AS GROSS_SALES,
SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT)			AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
SUM(NETSALES_AMT)				AS NETSALES_AMT,
SUM(SET_COUNT)					AS SET_COUNT,
COUNT(DISTINCT LeadID)  		AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT

FROM #T_ACTUAL_BASELINE A 
--LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
--ON A.BranchID = B.BranchID
WHERE  CAST(EntryDate AS DATE)  >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-2,'-01-01') AS DATE)
AND CAST(EntryDate AS DATE) <= GETDATE()
AND TX_SourceGroup IS NOT NULL AND TX_SourceGroup!='0' AND TX_SourceGroup!='NA'

GROUP BY 
A.Division,
A.EntryDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ACU_ID ,
A.ProductID ,
A.TX_Channel,
A.TX_SourceGroup,
A.TX_SourceCode;





TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE];


INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
(
IDENTIFIER		,
DIVISION		,
CalendarDate	,
BranchID		,
Market			,
ProductID		,
TX_Channel		,
TX_SourceGroup	,
TX_SourceCode	,
BTD				,
CANCELLED		,
DEMO			,
NET_ISSUED		,
SOLD			,
TOTAL_CANCEL	,
NETSALES		,
BTD_AMT			,
CANCELLED_AMT	,
GROSS_SALES		,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	,
NETSALES_AMT		,
SET_COUNT			,
RAW_LEAD_COUNT		,
LastUpdatedTS	
)

SELECT 
IDENTIFIER		,
Division		,
CalendarDate	,
BranchID		,
Market			,
ProductID		,
TX_Channel		,
TX_SourceGroup	,
TX_SourceCode	,
BTD,
CANCELLED,
DEMO,
NET_ISSUED,
SOLD,
TOTAL_CANCEL,
NETSALES,
BTD_AMT,
CANCELLED_AMT,
GROSS_SALES,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
NETSALES_AMT,
SET_COUNT,
RAW_LEAD_COUNT,
GETDATE()
FROM  #T_ACTUAL;

--##################### Start : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################
-- ############### Start : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,
M1.SubSourceID,
SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,
M2.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.EffectiveFrom 	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo  	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveTo
INTO #T_INC
FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2
ON M1.IncentivePlanID = M2.IncentivePlanID
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3
ON M2.IncentiveMetricID = M3.IncentiveMetricID
LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] SS
ON M1.SubSourceID = SS.Region_SubSource_ID;


--*******************************



SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentivePlanCategory,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType,
	INC.SubSourceFlag,
	INC.SubSource,
	INC.RegionalMetricFlag
	
	INTO #T_CAL
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN #T_INC INC
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveTo;



--*******************************




SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CASE WHEN A.RegionalMetricFlag ='Y' THEN RG.Market_SubSource ELSE NULL END AS ACU_ID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID;




IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_EMP_METRICS') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS;
	
CREATE TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS
(
	EmployeePK 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Division 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    PeriodDate 			DATE			,
    IncentiveMetricID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    DistributionType 	NVARCHAR(50)	,
	IncentivePlanID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Metric_Budget 		DECIMAL(18,6)	,
	Metric_Actual 		DECIMAL(18,6)	
);


DECLARE @Year INT
SET 	@Year = 2026




-- ############### END : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################
--##################### End : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################





--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_1    DIVISION_EBITDA   ***********
--#############################################################


INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
EmployeePK							,
Division							,
PeriodDate							,
IncentiveMetricID					,
DistributionType					,
IncentivePlanID						,
SUM(Metric_Budget) AS Metric_Budget	,
SUM(Metric_Actual) AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK	,
		A.Division		,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType			,
		A.IncentiveMetricID			,
		A.IncentivePlanID			,
		B.BudgetValue AS Metric_Budget	,
		B.ActualValue AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN (
				SELECT * FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric IN ('DIVISION_EBITDA')  	
				) B 
				
		ON A.Division = B.Division
		
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

		AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
												END
												)
		
		
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'DIVISION_EBITDA'
		
	
		) M1 

GROUP BY 
EmployeePK							,
Division							,
PeriodDate							,
DistributionType					,
IncentiveMetricID					,
IncentivePlanID			;






--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

UPDATE A 
SET A.TargetValue = B.Metric_Budget,
	A.ActualValue = B.Metric_Actual
FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT] A 
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS B 
ON 

	A.EmployeePK						=        B.EmployeePK		
AND A.Division							=        B.Division			
AND A.PeriodDate						=        B.PeriodDate		
AND A.IncentiveMetricID					=        B.IncentiveMetricID	
AND A.DistributionType					=        B.DistributionType	
AND A.IncentivePlanID	                =        B.IncentivePlanID	;

--##################### Start : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################
-- ############### Start : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,
M1.SubSourceID,
SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,
M2.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.EffectiveFrom 	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo  	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveTo
INTO #T_INC
FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2
ON M1.IncentivePlanID = M2.IncentivePlanID
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3
ON M2.IncentiveMetricID = M3.IncentiveMetricID
LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] SS
ON M1.SubSourceID = SS.Region_SubSource_ID;


--*******************************



SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentivePlanCategory,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType,
	INC.SubSourceFlag,
	INC.SubSource,
	INC.RegionalMetricFlag
	
	INTO #T_CAL
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN #T_INC INC
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveTo;



--*******************************




SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CASE WHEN A.RegionalMetricFlag ='Y' THEN RG.Market_SubSource ELSE NULL END AS ACU_ID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID;




IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_EMP_METRICS') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS;
	
CREATE TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS
(
	EmployeePK 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Division 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    PeriodDate 			DATE			,
    IncentiveMetricID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    DistributionType 	NVARCHAR(50)	,
	IncentivePlanID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Metric_Budget 		DECIMAL(18,6)	,
	Metric_Actual 		DECIMAL(18,6)	
);


DECLARE @Year INT
SET 	@Year = 2026




-- ############### END : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################
--##################### End : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################





--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_2A    ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_EBITDA   ****
--#############################################################


INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
EmployeePK							,
Division							,
PeriodDate							,
IncentiveMetricID					,
DistributionType					,
IncentivePlanID						,
SUM(Metric_Budget) AS Metric_Budget	,
SUM(Metric_Actual) AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK	,
		A.Division		,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType			,
		A.IncentiveMetricID			,
		A.IncentivePlanID			,
		B.BudgetValue AS Metric_Budget	,
		B.ActualValue AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN (
				SELECT DISTINCT PeriodDate,Metric,SourceCode,ACU_ID,BudgetValue,ActualValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
				WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric IN ('ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_EBITDA')  	
				) B 
				
		ON A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

		AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
												END
												)
		
		
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_EBITDA'

INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

DistributionType					,

AVG(Metric_Budget) AS Metric_Budget	,

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK	,
		A.Division		,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))

		A.IncentiveMetricID			,
		A.IncentivePlanID			,
		B.BudgetValue AS Metric_Budget	,

				WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric IN ('ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_SCORECARD')

		ON A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

		AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
												END
												)
		
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_SCORECARD'
		
	
		) M1 

GROUP BY 
EmployeePK							,
Division							,
PeriodDate							,
DistributionType					,
IncentiveMetricID					,

SELECT

	FROM

				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
			END 											AS PeriodDate,
			A.DistributionType,
			A.IncentiveMetricID,
			A.IncentivePlanID,
			A.SubSource,
			A.ACU_ID,
			B.BudgetValue AS Metric_Budget
			
			FROM #T_EMP A

			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric
			
			AND (
					A.SubSource IS NULL
					OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
					)
			AND (
					A.ACU_ID IS NULL
					OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
					)
	
			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
					
			WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT'
			
			) MX1
		GROUP BY 
		EmployeePK,
		Division,
		PeriodDate,

		AND (

				)

		AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
												END
												)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT'
		
		) MX2
	
	GROUP BY 	
	EmployeePK,

            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CASE WHEN A.RegionalMetricFlag ='Y' THEN RG.Market_SubSource ELSE NULL END AS ACU_ID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID;

    DistributionType 	NVARCHAR(50)	,
	IncentivePlanID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Metric_Budget 		DECIMAL(18,6)	,
	Metric_Actual 		DECIMAL(18,6)	
);

--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_6    CC_COST_PER_NETSALES_AMT   ***********
--#############################################################





INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
M1.Metric_Budget	 	AS Metric_Budget,
M2.Metric_Actual		AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
	-- ******** Start: Budget Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.CC_COST_BUDGET) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'CC_COST_PER_NETSALES_AMT'								AS Metric		,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)						AS Division		,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate)					AS PeriodDate	,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID)							AS ACU_ID		,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)					AS SourceCode	,
							M1.BudgetValue												AS CC_COST_BUDGET,
							M2.BudgetValue												AS NETSALES_AMT
							
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='CC_COST'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							
							FULL JOIN 
							
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='NETSALES_AMT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							
							ON M1.PeriodDate 	= M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID 		= M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode 	= M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 	= M2.Division
							
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
		
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='CC_COST_PER_NETSALES_AMT'
		
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 
		
LEFT JOIN 

(

	-- ******** Start: Actual Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,		
		
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.CC_COST_ACTUAL) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'CC_COST_PER_NETSALES_AMT'								AS Metric		,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)						AS Division		,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.CalendarDate)					AS PeriodDate	,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.Market)							AS ACU_ID		,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.TX_SourceCode)					AS SourceCode	,
							M1.ActualValue												AS CC_COST_ACTUAL,
							M2.NETSALES_AMT												AS NETSALES_AMT
							
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(ActualValue) AS  ActualValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='CC_COST'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							
							FULL JOIN 
							
							(
								SELECT 
									Division,EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode,
									SUM(NETSALES_AMT) AS NETSALES_AMT
									FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
									WHERE IDENTIFIER='APPOINTMENT_DATE'
									GROUP BY 
									Division,EOMONTH(CalendarDate),Market,TX_SourceCode
								) M2
							
							ON M1.PeriodDate 	= M2.CalendarDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID 		= M2.Market
							AND M1.SourceCode 	= M2.TX_SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 	= M2.Division
							
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)

			
			
			WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='CC_COST_PER_NETSALES_AMT'
			
			GROUP BY 
			A.EmployeePK,
			A.Division,
			CASE 
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
			END 										,
			A.DistributionType,
			A.IncentiveMetricID,
			A.IncentivePlanID


			) M2

ON 
M1.EmployeePK 					= M2.EmployeePK			
AND M1.Division	  				= M2.Division			
AND M1.PeriodDate 				= M2.PeriodDate			
AND M1.DistributionType 		= M2.DistributionType	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID			= M2.IncentivePlanID
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID		= M2.IncentiveMetricID;
		





--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

UPDATE A 
SET A.TargetValue = B.Metric_Budget,
	A.ActualValue = B.Metric_Actual
FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT] A 
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS B 
ON 

	A.EmployeePK						=        B.EmployeePK		
AND A.Division							=        B.Division			
AND A.PeriodDate						=        B.PeriodDate		
AND A.IncentiveMetricID					=        B.IncentiveMetricID	
AND A.DistributionType					=        B.DistributionType	
AND A.IncentivePlanID	                =        B.IncentivePlanID	;

--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_7    NSLI_AMT   ***********
--#############################################################




INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
M1.Metric_Budget	 	AS Metric_Budget,
M2.Metric_Actual		AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
	-- ******** Start: Budget Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NET_ISSUED_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NET_ISSUED_COUNT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'NSLI_AMT'								AS Metric,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)		AS Division,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate)	AS PeriodDate,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID)			AS ACU_ID,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)	AS SourceCode,
							M1.BudgetValue								AS NETSALES_AMT,
							M2.BudgetValue								AS NET_ISSUED_COUNT
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='NETSALES_AMT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							FULL JOIN 
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							ON M1.PeriodDate = M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID = M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode = M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division = M2.Division
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NSLI_AMT'
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 									,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 
		
	-- ******** End: Budget Numbers *******

LEFT JOIN 
	
	(
		
	-- ******** Start: Actual Numbers *******
	
	SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,		
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NET_ISSUED_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NET_ISSUED_COUNT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		
		JOIN 
		
		(
			SELECT 
				Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode,
				SUM(NETSALES_AMT) AS NETSALES_AMT,
				SUM(NET_ISSUED) AS NET_ISSUED_COUNT
				FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
				WHERE IDENTIFIER='APPOINTMENT_DATE'
				AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI')  -- ** Excluding Wisconsin & Minnesota For West
				GROUP BY 
				Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode
				
				) B
		
		ON  A.Division 							= B.Division 

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.TX_SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.Market,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
													END
													)
			
			WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'NSLI_AMT'
		
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
			END,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
				
				
		-- ******** End: Actual Numbers *******
				
		)  M2
		
ON 
M1.EmployeePK 					= M2.EmployeePK			
AND M1.Division	  				= M2.Division			
AND M1.PeriodDate 				= M2.PeriodDate			
AND M1.DistributionType 		= M2.DistributionType	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID			= M2.IncentivePlanID
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID		= M2.IncentiveMetricID;





--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

UPDATE A 
SET A.TargetValue = B.Metric_Budget,
	A.ActualValue = B.Metric_Actual
FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT] A 
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS B 
ON 

	A.EmployeePK						=        B.EmployeePK		
AND A.Division							=        B.Division			
AND A.PeriodDate						=        B.PeriodDate		
AND A.IncentiveMetricID					=        B.IncentiveMetricID	
AND A.DistributionType					=        B.DistributionType	
AND A.IncentivePlanID	                =        B.IncentivePlanID	;

--##################### Start : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################
-- ############### Start : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,
M1.SubSourceID,
SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,
M2.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.EffectiveFrom 	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo  	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveTo
INTO #T_INC
FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2

FROM 
(

			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))

		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,

		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric='NET_REVENUE') B

				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL

				)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NET_REVENUE'
		
		
		GROUP BY

		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		
		) M1 

LEFT JOIN

			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))

		FROM #T_EMP A

													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
												END
												)
		
		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NET_REVENUE'
		
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		
		) M2


ON

M1.Division				= M2.Division						AND

--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_10    GROSS_MARGIN  			***********
--#############################################################





INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
ABS(M1.Metric_Budget)	 	AS Metric_Budget,
ABS(M1.Metric_Actual)		AS Metric_Actual
FROM 

(
	-- ******** Start: Budget Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NET_REVENUE_BUDGET) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.GROSS_PROFIT_BUDGET) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NET_REVENUE_BUDGET), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Budget,
		
		
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NET_REVENUE_ACTUAL) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.GROSS_PROFIT_ACTUAL) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NET_REVENUE_ACTUAL), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'GROSS_MARGIN_PCT'													AS Metric,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division,M3.Division,M4.Division)			AS Division,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate,M3.PeriodDate,M4.PeriodDate)	AS PeriodDate,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID,M3.ACU_ID,M4.ACU_ID)					AS ACU_ID,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode,M3.SourceCode,M4.SourceCode)	AS SourceCode,
							M1.BudgetValue														AS NET_REVENUE_BUDGET,
							M2.BudgetValue														AS GROSS_PROFIT_BUDGET,
							M3.ActualValue														AS NET_REVENUE_ACTUAL,
							M4.ActualValue														AS GROSS_PROFIT_ACTUAL
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='NET_REVENUE'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							
							FULL JOIN 
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='GROSS_PROFIT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							ON M1.PeriodDate = M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID = M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode = M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division = M2.Division
							
							FULL JOIN 
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='NET_REVENUE'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M3
							ON M1.PeriodDate 	= M3.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID 		= M3.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode 	= M3.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 	= M3.Division
							
							FULL JOIN 
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='GROSS_PROFIT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M4
							ON M1.PeriodDate 	= M4.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID 		= M4.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode 	= M4.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 	= M4.Division
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='GROSS_MARGIN_PCT'
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 ;

		ELSE SUM(B.MC_BUDGET) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT_BUDGET), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Budget
		
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'MARKETING_COST_PCT'									AS Metric		,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)						AS Division		,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate)					AS PeriodDate	,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID)							AS ACU_ID		,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)					AS SourceCode	,
							M1.BudgetValue												AS NETSALES_AMT_BUDGET,
							M2.BudgetValue												AS MC_BUDGET
							
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='NETSALES_AMT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							
							FULL JOIN 
							
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='MARKETING_COST'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							
							ON M1.PeriodDate 	= M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID 		= M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode 	= M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 	= M2.Division
							
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='MARKETING_COST_PCT'
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 
		
	-- ******** End: Budget Numbers *******


LEFT JOIN 

(
	-- ******** Start: Actual Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT_ACTUAL) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.MC_ACTUAL) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.NETSALES_AMT_ACTUAL), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'MARKETING_COST_PCT'									AS Metric		,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)						AS Division		,
							COALESCE(M1.CalendarDate,M2.PeriodDate)					AS PeriodDate	,
							COALESCE(M1.Market,M2.ACU_ID)							AS ACU_ID		,
							COALESCE(M1.TX_SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)					AS SourceCode	,
							M1.NETSALES_AMT											AS NETSALES_AMT_ACTUAL,
							M2.MC_COST												AS MC_ACTUAL
							
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT 
									Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode,
									SUM(NETSALES_AMT) AS NETSALES_AMT
									FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
									WHERE IDENTIFIER='APPOINTMENT_DATE'
									AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI')  -- ** Excluding Wisconsin & Minnesota For West
									GROUP BY 
									Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode
								) M1
							
							FULL JOIN 
							
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(ActualValue) AS MC_COST FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
									WHERE [Year]=@Year
									AND Metric='MARKETING_COST'
									GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							
							ON M1.CalendarDate 		= M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.Market 			= M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.TX_SourceCode 	= M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division 		= M2.Division
							
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='MARKETING_COST_PCT'
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		-- ******** End: Actual Numbers *******
		
		) M2


	
ON 
M1.EmployeePK 					= M2.EmployeePK			
AND M1.Division	  				= M2.Division			
AND M1.PeriodDate 				= M2.PeriodDate			
AND M1.DistributionType 		= M2.DistributionType	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID			= M2.IncentivePlanID;

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,

SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,

INTO #T_INC

JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] SS

SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentivePlanCategory,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType,
	INC.SubSourceFlag,
	INC.SubSource,
	INC.RegionalMetricFlag
	
	INTO #T_CAL
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN #T_INC INC
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveTo;

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CASE WHEN A.RegionalMetricFlag ='Y' THEN RG.Market_SubSource ELSE NULL END AS ACU_ID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID;

--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_5    NETSALES_PER_LEAD_COUNT   ***********
--#############################################################


INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
M1.Metric_Budget	 	AS Metric_Budget,
M2.Metric_Actual		AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
	-- ******** Start: Budget Numbers *******
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 	( 		
					
						SELECT 
							'NET_ISSUE_RATE'						AS Metric,
							COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)		AS Division,
							COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate)	AS PeriodDate,
							COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID)			AS ACU_ID,
							COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)	AS SourceCode,
							M1.BudgetValue								AS ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,
							M2.BudgetValue								AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT
							FROM
							(	
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M1
							FULL JOIN 
							(
								SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
								WHERE [Year]=@Year
								AND Metric='RAW_LEAD_COUNT'
								GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode
								) M2
							ON M1.PeriodDate = M2.PeriodDate
							AND M1.ACU_ID = M2.ACU_ID
							AND M1.SourceCode = M2.SourceCode
							AND M1.Division = M2.Division
							
							) B 
		
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
													END
													)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NET_ISSUE_RATE'
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 										,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 
		
	-- ******** End: Budget Numbers *******

LEFT JOIN 
	
	(
		
	-- ******** Start: Actual Numbers *******
	
	SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,		
		CASE 
		WHEN SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.00
		ELSE SUM(B.NET_ISSUED) * 1.000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT), 0) * 1.000
		END AS Metric_Actual
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		
		JOIN 
		
		(
			SELECT 
				Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode,
				SUM(NET_ISSUED) AS NET_ISSUED,
				SUM(RAW_LEAD_COUNT) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT
				FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
				WHERE IDENTIFIER='ENTRY_DATE'
				AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI')  -- ** Excluding Wisconsin & Minnesota For West
				GROUP BY 
				Division,CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceCode
				
				) B
		
		ON  A.Division 							= B.Division 

			AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.TX_SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
			AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.Market,'NA1')
				)
		
			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
													END
													)
			
			WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'NET_ISSUE_RATE'
		
		
		GROUP BY 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
			END,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
				
				
		-- ******** End: Actual Numbers *******
				
		)  M2
		
ON 
M1.EmployeePK 					= M2.EmployeePK			
AND M1.Division	  				= M2.Division			
AND M1.PeriodDate 				= M2.PeriodDate			
AND M1.DistributionType 		= M2.DistributionType	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID			= M2.IncentivePlanID;





--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
M1.Metric_Budget	 	AS Metric_Budget,
M2.Metric_Actual		AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(

				-- ******** Start: Budget Numbers *******
	SELECT 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID,
	SUM(NETSALES_BY_RAW * RAW_LEAD_PCT) AS Metric_Budget
	FROM
	(
		SELECT *,
		CASE 
			WHEN (RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM) = 0 THEN 0.0000
			ELSE (RAW_LEAD_COUNT) * 1.0000 / NULLIF((RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM), 0) * 1.0000
			END AS RAW_LEAD_PCT
		FROM
		(
				SELECT *,
				SUM(RAW_LEAD_COUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeePK,Division,PeriodDate,DistributionType,IncentiveMetricID,IncentivePlanID ORDER BY PeriodDate) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM
				FROM
				(
	
						SELECT 
						A.EmployeePK,
						A.Division,
						CASE 
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
						END 											AS PeriodDate,
						A.DistributionType,
						A.IncentiveMetricID,
						A.IncentivePlanID,
						B.SourceGroup,
						SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT,
						SUM(B.NETSALES_COUNT) AS NETSALES_COUNT,
				
						CASE 
						WHEN SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.0000
						ELSE SUM(B.NETSALES_COUNT) * 1.0000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT), 0) * 1.0000
						END AS NETSALES_BY_RAW
						
						FROM #T_EMP A 
						JOIN 	( 		
									
										SELECT 
											'NETSALES_PER_LEAD_COUNT'					AS Metric			,
											COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)			AS Division			,
											COALESCE(M1.PeriodDate,M2.PeriodDate)		AS PeriodDate		,
											COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,M2.ACU_ID)				AS ACU_ID			,
											COALESCE(M1.SourceGroup,M2.SourceGroup)		AS SourceGroup		,
											COALESCE(M1.SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)		AS SourceCode		,
											M1.BudgetValue								AS NETSALES_COUNT	,
											M2.BudgetValue								AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT
											FROM
											(	
												SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceGroup,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
												WHERE [Year]=@Year
												AND Metric='NETSALES_COUNT'
												GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SourceGroup
												) M1
											FULL JOIN 
											(
												SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceGroup,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
												WHERE [Year]=@Year
												AND Metric='RAW_LEAD_COUNT'
												GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SourceGroup
												) M2
											ON M1.PeriodDate = M2.PeriodDate
											AND M1.ACU_ID = M2.ACU_ID
											AND M1.SourceCode = M2.SourceCode
											AND M1.Division = M2.Division
											
											) B 
						
							ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
							AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric
							AND (
								A.SubSource IS NULL
								OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
								)
							AND (
								A.ACU_ID IS NULL
								OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
								)
				
							AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
																	END
																	)
								
						WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NETSALES_PER_LEAD_COUNT'
						--AND A.Division='MAC'
						--AND A.EmployeePK=1007
						GROUP BY 
						A.EmployeePK,
						A.Division,
						CASE 
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
						END 										,
						A.DistributionType,
						A.IncentiveMetricID,
						A.IncentivePlanID,
						B.SourceGroup
				
					) M1_X
		
				) M2_X

			) M3_X

	GROUP BY 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 
		
	-- ******** End: Budget Numbers *******


LEFT JOIN 


(
	-- ******** Start: Actual Numbers *******
	SELECT 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID,
	--SUM(NETSALES_BY_RAW * RAW_LEAD_PCT) AS Metric_Actual,
	SUM(NETSALES_BY_RAW * RAW_LEAD_BUDGET_PCT) AS Metric_Actual
	FROM
	(
		SELECT *,
		CASE 
			WHEN (RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM) = 0 THEN 0.0000
			ELSE (RAW_LEAD_COUNT) * 1.0000 / NULLIF((RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM), 0) * 1.0000
			END AS RAW_LEAD_PCT,
		CASE 
			WHEN (RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET_CUMM) = 0 THEN 0.0000
			ELSE (RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET) * 1.0000 / NULLIF((RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET_CUMM), 0) * 1.0000
			END AS RAW_LEAD_BUDGET_PCT
		
		FROM
		(
				SELECT *,
				SUM(RAW_LEAD_COUNT) 		OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeePK,Division,PeriodDate,DistributionType,IncentiveMetricID,IncentivePlanID ORDER BY PeriodDate) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT_CUMM,
				SUM(RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET) 	OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeePK,Division,PeriodDate,DistributionType,IncentiveMetricID,IncentivePlanID ORDER BY PeriodDate) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET_CUMM
				
				FROM
				(
					
						SELECT 
						A.EmployeePK,
						A.Division,
						CASE 
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
						END 											AS PeriodDate,
						A.DistributionType,
						A.IncentiveMetricID,
						A.IncentivePlanID,
						B.SourceGroup,
						SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT,
						SUM(B.NETSALES_COUNT) AS NETSALES_COUNT,
						SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET,
				
						CASE 
						WHEN SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT) = 0 THEN 0.0000
						ELSE SUM(B.NETSALES_COUNT) * 1.0000 / NULLIF(SUM(B.RAW_LEAD_COUNT), 0) * 1.0000
						END AS NETSALES_BY_RAW
						
						FROM #T_EMP A 
						JOIN 	( 		
									
										SELECT 
											'NETSALES_PER_LEAD_COUNT'								AS Metric			,
											COALESCE(M1.Division,M2.Division)						AS Division			,
											COALESCE(M1.CalendarDate,M2.PeriodDate)					AS PeriodDate		,
											COALESCE(M1.Market,M2.ACU_ID)							AS ACU_ID			,
											COALESCE(M1.TX_SourceGroup,M2.SourceGroup)				AS SourceGroup		,
											COALESCE(M1.TX_SourceCode,M2.SourceCode)				AS SourceCode		,
											M1.NETSALES									AS NETSALES_COUNT	,
											M1.RAW_LEAD_COUNT							AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT	,
											M2.BudgetValue								AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT_BUDGET
											FROM
											(SELECT 
												Division,EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,Market,TX_SourceGroup,TX_SourceCode,
												SUM(NETSALES) AS NETSALES,
												SUM(RAW_LEAD_COUNT) AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT
												FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE]
												WHERE IDENTIFIER='ENTRY_DATE'
												AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI')  -- ** Excluding Wisconsin & Minnesota For West
												GROUP BY 
												Division,EOMONTH(CalendarDate),Market,TX_SourceCode,TX_SourceGroup
												) M1
												
											FULL JOIN 
											(
												SELECT Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceGroup,SourceCode,SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
												WHERE [Year]=@Year
												AND Metric='RAW_LEAD_COUNT'
												GROUP BY Division,PeriodDate,ACU_ID,SourceCode,SourceGroup
												) M2
											
											ON  M1.CalendarDate 	= M2.PeriodDate
											AND M1.Market 			= M2.ACU_ID
											AND M1.TX_SourceCode 	= M2.SourceCode
											AND M1.Division 		= M2.Division
											
											
											) B 
						
							ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
							AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric
							AND (
								A.SubSource IS NULL
								OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
								)
							AND (
								A.ACU_ID IS NULL
								OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
								)
				
							AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
																	WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
																	END
																	)
								
						WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NETSALES_PER_LEAD_COUNT'
						--AND A.Division='MAC'
						--AND A.EmployeePK=1007
						GROUP BY 
						A.EmployeePK,
						A.Division,
						CASE 
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
							WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
						END 										,
						A.DistributionType,
						A.IncentiveMetricID,
						A.IncentivePlanID,
						B.SourceGroup
				
					) M1_X
		
				) M2_X

			) M3_X

	GROUP BY 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID
	
	-- ******** End: Actual Numbers *******
		
		) M2


ON 
M1.EmployeePK 					= M2.EmployeePK			
AND M1.Division	  				= M2.Division			
AND M1.PeriodDate 				= M2.PeriodDate			
AND M1.DistributionType 		= M2.DistributionType	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID			= M2.IncentivePlanID
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID		= M2.IncentiveMetricID;

UPDATE A 
SET A.TargetValue = B.Metric_Budget,
	A.ActualValue = B.Metric_Actual
FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT] A 
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS B 
ON 

	A.EmployeePK						=        B.EmployeePK		
AND A.Division							=        B.Division

AND A.IncentiveMetricID					=        B.IncentiveMetricID

AND A.IncentivePlanID	                =        B.IncentivePlanID	;

-- ############### Start : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,
M1.SubSourceID,
SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,
M2.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.EffectiveFrom 	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo  	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveTo
INTO #T_INC
FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2
ON M1.IncentivePlanID = M2.IncentivePlanID
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3
ON M2.IncentiveMetricID = M3.IncentiveMetricID
LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] SS
ON M1.SubSourceID = SS.Region_SubSource_ID;


--*******************************



SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentivePlanCategory,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType,
	INC.SubSourceFlag,
	INC.SubSource,
	INC.RegionalMetricFlag
	
	INTO #T_CAL
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN #T_INC INC
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveTo;



--*******************************




SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CASE WHEN A.RegionalMetricFlag ='Y' THEN RG.Market_SubSource ELSE NULL END AS ACU_ID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID;




IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_EMP_METRICS') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS;

(
	EmployeePK 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Division 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    PeriodDate 			DATE			,
    IncentiveMetricID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    DistributionType 	NVARCHAR(50)	,
	IncentivePlanID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Metric_Budget 		DECIMAL(18,6)	,
	Metric_Actual 		DECIMAL(18,6)	
);


DECLARE @Year INT
SET 	@Year = 2026
