--##################### End : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################





--##############################################################################
--################### Start : NPS BASELINE #####################################
--##############################################################################


SELECT 
RM.Division,
RM.Response_Date,
RM.Promoter_NPS,
RM.Detractor_NPS,
RM.Survey_ID,
RM.ACU_ID,
SS.TX_Channel,
SS.TX_SourceGroup,
SS.TX_SourceCode
INTO #T_NPS_BASELINE
FROM

	(
	
	SELECT 
			A.Division,
			A.BranchID,
			A.LeadID,
			B.LeadSubSourceID,
			C.ACU_ID AS ACU_ID,
			A.Response_Date		                                                            AS Response_Date,
			CASE WHEN A.Service_NPS >= 9                  THEN A.Survey_ID END                  AS Promoter_NPS,
			CASE WHEN A.Service_NPS BETWEEN 0 AND 6       THEN A.Survey_ID END                  AS Detractor_NPS,
			Survey_ID
		FROM EDW.FACT_MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY A 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD B 
		ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
		LEFT JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN C 
		ON A.BranchID = C.BranchID
		WHERE YEAR(A.Response_Date)>=YEAR(GETDATE())-1
		AND A.Program IN ('Installation Experience','Installation Experience New' )
		AND A.Service_NPS IS NOT NULL
		AND A.ActiveInd='1'
		--AND NPS_Single_Filter_Flag=1
		
		) RM
	
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING SS
		ON RM.LeadSubSourceID = SS.LeadSubSourceID;
		
		

--############################################################################
--################### End : NPS BASELINE #####################################
--############################################################################




--##############################################################################
--################### Start : Sales Satisfaction ###############################
--##############################################################################



SELECT
		COALESCE(FC.Division,SE.Division) 						AS Division,
		COALESCE(FC.PeriodDate,SE.PeriodDate) 					AS PeriodDate,
		--COALESCE(FC.ACU_ID,SE.ACU_ID) 							AS ACU_ID,
		CAST('SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX' AS NVARCHAR(100))                       AS IncentiveMetricID,
		Future_Consideration_50pct_DNS,
		Sales_Experience_50pct_DNS,
		ROUND(
			FC.Future_Consideration_50pct_DNS + SE.Sales_Experience_50pct_DNS
		, 1)                                                                    AS ActualValue
	
	INTO #T_SALES_SATISFACTION
	
	FROM
	
		-- Future Consideration  — filtered on Response_Date
		(
			
		SELECT 
		Division,
		--ACU_ID,
		PeriodDate,
		AVG(Future_Consideration) * 0.5  AS Future_Consideration_50pct_DNS
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT 
				B.Market AS Division,
				--B.ACU_ID,
				EOMONTH(CAST(Response_Date AS DATE)) AS PeriodDate,
				AVG(CAST(A.Future_Consideration AS DECIMAL(16,6)))  AS Future_Consideration
			FROM EDW.FACT_MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY A 
			JOIN [RDM].[REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP] B
			ON A.BranchID = B.BranchID
			WHERE  Response_Date >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1, 1, 1)
			AND   Response_Date <= EOMONTH(GETDATE())
			AND A.Reason_For_Consideration != '"1- Price"'
			AND A.ActiveInd=1
			AND  ISNUMERIC(A.Future_Consideration) = 1 
			GROUP BY  B.Market ,
			EOMONTH(CAST(Response_Date AS DATE))
			--B.ACU_ID

			) FC_1
		GROUP BY 
		Division,
		--ACU_ID,
		PeriodDate		
			
		) FC
	
	JOIN
	
		-- Sales Experience — filtered on Response_Date
		(
		
		SELECT 
		Division,
		--ACU_ID,
		PeriodDate,
		AVG(Sales_Experience /2 ) * 0.5  AS Sales_Experience_50pct_DNS
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT 
			B.Market AS Division,
			--B.ACU_ID,
			EOMONTH(CAST(Response_Date AS DATE)) AS PeriodDate,
			AVG(A.Sales_Experience * 1.00000)  AS Sales_Experience
				FROM EDW.FACT_MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY A
				JOIN [RDM].[REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP] B
				ON A.BranchID = B.BranchID
				WHERE Response_Date >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1, 1, 1)
					AND   Response_Date <= EOMONTH(GETDATE())
				AND A.Program = 'Installation Experience New' 
				AND A.ActiveInd=1
			GROUP BY  B.Market ,
			EOMONTH(CAST(Response_Date AS DATE))
			--B.ACU_ID
			
			) SE_1
		
		GROUP BY 
		Division,
		--ACU_ID,
		PeriodDate
	
		) SE
	
	ON  FC.Division  = SE.Division
	AND FC.PeriodDate = SE.PeriodDate
	--AND FC.ACU_ID = SE.ACU_ID
	
	WHERE FC.PeriodDate >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-2,'-01-01') AS DATE);
	




--##############################################################################
--################### End : Sales Satisfaction #################################
--##############################################################################








--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric-A    NPS                        ***********
--#############################################################

INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
M1.Metric_Budget 						AS Metric_Budget,
(( COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Promoter_NPS)  * 1.00 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Survey_ID), 0) * 1.00 )
-( COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Detractor_NPS) * 1.00 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Survey_ID), 0) * 1.00 )) * 100 AS Metric_Actual

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
		END 									AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		A.SubSource,
		A.ACU_ID,
		-- AVG rolls up monthly budget values dynamically based on DistributionType
		AVG(B.BudgetValue) 					AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 
			(
				SELECT Division, Metric, PeriodDate, BudgetValue--, SourceCode, ACU_ID
				FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
				WHERE [Year] = @Year 
				AND   Metric = 'NPS'
			) B 
		ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric
		
		/*
		
		
		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)
		
		
		*/
		
		AND A.PeriodDate					= CASE 
												WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
												WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
												WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
											END
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'NPS'
		
		GROUP BY
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
		END,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		A.SubSource,
		A.ACU_ID

		) M1 

LEFT JOIN #T_NPS_BASELINE M2 
ON  M1.Division 					= M2.Division 

AND (
				M1.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(M1.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(M2.TX_SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				M1.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(M1.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(M2.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

AND M1.PeriodDate					= CASE 
										WHEN M1.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(M2.Response_Date)
										WHEN M1.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, M2.Response_Date), 0)))
										WHEN M1.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(M2.Response_Date), 12, 1))
									  END

GROUP BY 
M1.EmployeePK,
M1.Division,
M1.PeriodDate,
M1.IncentiveMetricID,
M1.DistributionType,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.Metric_Budget;




--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric-B    SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX   ***********
--#############################################################

INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS
SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
AVG(M1.Metric_Budget) 	AS Metric_Budget	,
AVG(M2.ActualValue) 	AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
		END											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		-- AVG rolls up monthly budget values to whatever period the employee plan runs on
		AVG(B.BudgetValue)							AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN 
			(
				SELECT Division, Metric, PeriodDate, BudgetValue
				FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
				WHERE [Year] = @Year 
				AND   Metric = 'SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX'
			) B 
		ON  A.Division          = B.Division 
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID = B.Metric
		-- Match monthly budget date to employee's distribution period dynamically
		AND A.PeriodDate        = CASE 
									WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
									WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
									WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
								  END
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID = 'SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX'
		
		GROUP BY
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'   THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY' THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, B.PeriodDate), 0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'    THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate), 12, 1))
		END,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID
		
		) M1 

LEFT JOIN #T_SALES_SATISFACTION M2 
ON  M1.Division          = M2.Division 
AND M1.PeriodDate        = M2.PeriodDate
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID = M2.IncentiveMetricID


GROUP BY 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID	;




--##########################################################
--- Start : COMBINING SS_INDEX AND NPS AT MONTHLY  for CSI
--##########################################################


SELECT 
M2.Division,
EOMONTH(CAST(M2.Response_Date AS DATE)) AS Response_Date,
(( COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Promoter_NPS)  * 1.00 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Survey_ID), 0) * 1.00 )
-( COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Detractor_NPS) * 1.00 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT M2.Survey_ID), 0) * 1.00 )) AS NPS_Score

INTO #T_NPS_ROLLED_UP
FROM #T_NPS_BASELINE M2
GROUP BY 
M2.Division,
EOMONTH(CAST(M2.Response_Date AS DATE));



--***********************


SELECT 
A.Division,
A.PeriodDate,
'CUSTOMER_EXPERIENCE_INDEX' AS IncentiveMetricID,
( (10 * A.ActualValue) + (0.5 * B.NPS_Score*100) ) AS CS_INDEX
INTO #T_CS_INDEX
FROM #T_SALES_SATISFACTION A 
JOIN #T_NPS_ROLLED_UP B
ON A.PeriodDate = B.Response_Date
AND A.Division = B.Division;


--########### EXTRA POLATE THESE VALUES TILL EOY #################


WITH LatestActual AS
(
    SELECT
        Division,
        IncentiveMetricID,
        PeriodDate,
        CS_INDEX,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER
        (
            PARTITION BY Division
            ORDER BY PeriodDate DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM #T_CS_INDEX
    WHERE IncentiveMetricID = 'CUSTOMER_EXPERIENCE_INDEX'
),

LatestOnly AS
(
    SELECT
        Division,
        IncentiveMetricID,
        PeriodDate,
        CS_INDEX
    FROM LatestActual
    WHERE rn = 1
)


INSERT INTO #T_CS_INDEX

-- Future months till EOY using latest value
SELECT
    l.Division,
    b.PeriodDate,
    l.IncentiveMetricID,
    l.CS_INDEX
FROM LatestOnly l
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] b
    ON b.Division = l.Division
   AND b.Metric = 'CUSTOMER_EXPERIENCE_INDEX'
   AND b.PeriodDate > l.PeriodDate
   AND YEAR(b.PeriodDate) = YEAR(l.PeriodDate) ;

--########################################################
--- End : COMBINING SS_INDEX AND NPS AT MONTHLY  for CSI
--########################################################

--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

UPDATE A 
SET A.TargetValue = B.Metric_Budget,
	A.ActualValue = B.Metric_Actual
FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT] A 
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS B 
ON 

	A.EmployeePK						=        B.EmployeePK		
AND A.Division							=        B.Division			
AND A.PeriodDate						=        B.PeriodDate		
AND A.IncentiveMetricID					=        B.IncentiveMetricID	
AND A.DistributionType					=        B.DistributionType	
AND A.IncentivePlanID	                =        B.IncentivePlanID	;
